movement_command_to_state_collision_draw.inference: F0267 resolves chained teleporters and open pits before writing final result/sensor transitions, including party direction changes and level changes.
Normal dungeon view draws in the main loop after timeline processing, using current party direction/coords, while movement cooldown ticks down once per loop.
During pit falls, F0267 may draw intermediate dungeon views inline instead of waiting for the normal main-loop draw.
